mapper.sql: id, request_id, task_no, project_id, project_type, task_rule, task_data, request_status, request_body, original_body, optimize_result, predict_inventory, ship_plan_check_amount, ship_plan_time, ship_plan_id, available_inventory_down, cal_result_code, opt_target, temp_data, re_request_id, re_task_no, re_create_time, is_delete, create_time, create_user_id, update_time, update_user_id, tenant_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pl_project_task ( request_id, task_no, project_id, project_type, task_rule, task_data, request_status, request_body, original_body, optimize_result, predict_inventory, ship_plan_check_amount, ship_plan_time, ship_plan_id, available_inventory_down, cal_result_code, opt_target, temp_data, re_request_id, re_task_no, re_create_time, is_delete, create_time, create_user_id, update_time, update_user_id, tenant_id ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{taskNo}, #{projectId}, #{projectType}, #{taskRule}, #{taskData}, #{requestStatus}, #{requestBody}, #{originalBody}, #{optimizeResult}, #{predictInventory}, #{shipPlanCheckAmount}, #{shipPlanTime}, #{shipPlanId}, #{availableInventoryDown}, #{calResultCode}, #{optTarget}, #{tempData}, #{reRequestId}, #{reTaskNo}, #{reCreateTime}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{createUserId}, #{updateTime}, #{updateUserId}, #{tenantId} )

INSERT INTO pl_project_task
request_id, task_no, project_id, project_type, task_rule, task_data, request_status, request_body, original_body, optimize_result, predict_inventory, ship_plan_check_amount, ship_plan_time, ship_plan_id, available_inventory_down, cal_result_code, opt_target, temp_data, re_request_id, re_task_no, re_create_time, is_delete, create_time, create_user_id, update_time, update_user_id, tenant_id,
#{requestId}, #{taskNo}, #{projectId}, #{projectType}, #{taskRule}, #{taskData}, #{requestStatus}, #{requestBody}, #{originalBody}, #{optimizeResult}, #{predictInventory}, #{shipPlanCheckAmount}, #{shipPlanTime}, #{shipPlanId}, #{availableInventoryDown}, #{calResultCode}, #{optTarget}, #{tempData}, #{reRequestId}, #{reTaskNo}, #{reCreateTime}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{createUserId}, #{updateTime}, #{updateUserId}, #{tenantId},
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM pl_project_task WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0

SELECT
FROM pl_project_task WHERE task_no = #{taskNo} AND is_delete = 0

SELECT
FROM pl_project_task WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND is_delete = 0

SELECT
FROM pl_project_task WHERE request_id = #{requestId} AND is_delete = 0
